content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation modules (like ICM from Topic A) should be baked directly into the state-of-the-art active learning agent memory architectures emerging in 2024-2025 (Topic B) to prioritize storing unexpected, unlabeled observations that drive long-term learning, rather than just storing high-confidence labeled data. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where curious exploration of unknown environments expands memory capacity for the most useful unlabeled data that improves future active learning.
